name: BlueKCCommonFulFmntMetadataFileHistLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT comm.COMM_ID AS COMM_ID, comm.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD AS COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD AS COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_SENT_DTM AS COMM_SENT_DTM, comm.COMM_STTUS_CD AS COMM_STTUS_CD, comm.CRT_DTM AS CRT_DTM, comm.COMM_SK AS COMM_SK, comm.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX AS COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, comm.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT AS COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, comm.CRT_USER_ID AS CRT_USER_ID, CAST(commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM AS varchar(50)) AS COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM] comm LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM_HIST] commhist ON comm.COMM_SK=commhist.COMM_SK AND comm.COMM_SENT_DTM=commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM WHERE comm.COMM_TYP_CD IN ('ALTRSTAFILE','AGPAHUBFILE') --and LAST_UPDT_DTM > DATEADD(HOUR, -24, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) SELECT COMM_ID, COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, COMM_SENT_DTM, COMM_STTUS_CD, CRT_DTM, COMM_SK, COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, CRT_USER_ID FROM cte WHERE COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST IS NULL

CALLED BY : BlueKCCommonFulFmntMetadataFileSeq


PROCESSING : Job will insert new records or updated records from COMM table  to COMM_HIST table.
